subject: WM-0146 ready: playable product UX acceptance reset
body: Please claim and execute WM-0146 from D:\\WebProjects\\WumingTown-WM-0146 as gameplay-designer. This is a spec/control task, not implementation. Produce the first-five-minute product spec and acceptance reset centered on visible NPC action, a 2-3 minute dusk lamp/simple-build slice, first-screen information priority, structured success/failure paths and no public release/platform verdict changes. Run the task-required control-plane checks, write coordination/reports/WM-0146.md and complete for reviewer.
